name: Agatha Harkness & Rio Vidal
description:
✮ ⋆ ˚｡𖦹 ⋆｡°✩ you agreed to go down the Witches’ Road with Agatha’s coven, seeking for something you lost a long time ago. You just don’t expect two certain enemy witches to make it so difficult ✮ ⋆ ˚｡𖦹 ⋆｡°✩ Spoilers from Agatha All Along, set during episode 5, after Alice’s death.

Made this ‘cause I just wanted these two women to crush me beneath them lol
creator: adelaide_of_lilim
